data.title: Tariff Fears And Ease In Demand Hype Slows Semiconductor Expansion
data.description: Leading chipmakers and packagers, including TSMC and Intel, have slowed expansions in Japan and Malaysia due to weaker demand for older chips and tariff uncertainties.

data.title: Jim Cramer Says He Is 'Pro-Tariff' And Hates 'Free Trade:' 'It's Cost Us Fortunes'
data.description: CNBC's  Jim Cramer has criticized free trade, holding it responsible for the devastation of small towns in the United States.

data.title: Grant Cardone Says Trump 'Wants to Make Canada the 51st State'—Experts Break Down The Tariffs Impacting Over $100 Billion In Trade
Tariff Fears And Ease In Demand Hype Slows Semiconductor Expansion
data.description: Leading chipmakers and packagers, including TSMC and Intel, have slowed expansions in Japan and Malaysia due to weaker demand for older chips and tariff uncertainties.

data.title: W. R. Berkley Stock Soars After Mitsui Sumitomo Investment Signals Long-Term Growth Alignment
data.description: Mitsui Sumitomo Insurance will acquire 15% stake in W.R. Berkley Corp. through investment and voting agreement. Berkley family will retain full ownership.
